title: spiralepis squarrosa
intro: Spiralepis squarrosa, commonly known as the square-leaved spiralepis, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. As a medicinal plant, Spiralepis squarrosa has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Spiralepis squarrosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Spiralepis squarrosa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
